description: Perfect for those getaways, the Wiki 3 backpack from wildcraft has ample space to carry all your essentials. So grab your daypack and jet set into a vacation mode.MeasurementHeight: 18 inchesWidth: 13 inchesDepth: 5 inchesCapacity: 27.5 litresWarranty: 5 yearsMade of shadow ripstop 600D for durability and easy maintenanceNylon bonded thread for longer lifeBranded, water resistant reverse zippers and sliders for easy use and durabilityConvenient large double compartment to store booksFront utility pocket to store a sipper and everyday requirementsSlash pocket on the front for extra storage Curved padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesMesh pockets on the side for sipperHaul loop for handling easeBar tacked on specialized machines for enhanced durabilityWash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
